calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christine James appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Ms. James stated that she is not aware of any opposition. The Court stated that it is still looking for a revised order reflecting the amended petition. Ms. James stated that she believes she submitted a revised order with regard to the second amended petition, that she will submit the issue of .31 cents instead of .35 cents to the Court, that the 2.78% is intended, that the calculation is correct and does not change, that the interest for Tom is from the Mother's estate and it is open and pending. The Second Amended Petition for Final Distribution is under submission. The Court informed Ms. James that she needs to get the order to Court promptly.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Continued To Jul-31-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christine James appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court stated that there are complications arising from a string of assignments putting aside the issue of whether the assignments were a good deal for the Assignors, that the supplement indicates that one of the distributees has past away and that there needs to be an amendment. Ms. James stated that there are no deceased distributees, spoke of the notice requirements and stated that she filed a supplement yesterday that does a revised distribution. The Court informed Ms. James that amendments need to be noticed the same way a petition does. Discussion was held regarding the requirements of Probate Code 11604.5. The Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to July 31, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 so that an amendment is filed and properly noticed, and so that any other issues are taken care of.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Apr-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christine James appeared by telephone for Deanna Montgomery (Petitioner).

Ms. James stated that everything is still outstanding, that she started publication, but it was not 15-days in advance, and that she needs time for full publication. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to April 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.
